emails.company: Marsh Cove Dental and Implant Center
emails.subject: Marsh Cove Dental — implant consult follow-ups
emails.body:
Hey Evgeny,

Came across Marsh Cove Dental and Implant Center while researching Naples dental practices. Really strong positioning on implants.

Quick observation: implant patients are high-intent — they've already decided they want the procedure. But they call 2-3 offices before booking. The practice that follows up fastest gets the consult.

I build AI follow-up systems for dental practices — captures missed calls, sends a personalized text back within 2 minutes, books the consult automatically.

I build and run the whole system free for 2 weeks so you can see how many consult leads it recovers before you decide if it's worth paying for.

Worth 15 minutes?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: High-value implant consults lost to slow follow-up — patients call 2-3 offices and book with whoever responds first
emails.hook: Implant patient high-intent + multi-office shopping behavior
emails.research_notes: Implant Center branding, Dentist/Owner = Evgeny, no automated booking observed, strong Google presence

emails.subject: Berman PT — direct-pay patient inquiry question
emails.body:
Hey Jake,

Found Berman Physical Therapy while looking at direct-pay practices in Naples — love the model. No insurance, no middleman.

Here's the thing about direct-pay patients: they're already sold on paying out of pocket. That's a motivated patient. But if they call at 7pm for a new patient consult and get voicemail, by morning they've either forgotten or moved on.

I build AI intake systems for cash-pay practices — answers calls 24/7, handles new patient questions, books the initial eval.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see the actual patients it captures before committing to anything.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Direct-pay PT patients are motivated but phone-first — off-hours missed calls mean lost patients who won't call back
emails.hook: Direct-pay model = zero friction patients who are already sold; gap is availability not quality
emails.research_notes: Direct-pay model confirmed, phone-first intake, no online booking widget, Jake Berman = owner

emails.subject: Fantastic Dental Arts — new patient calls during procedures
emails.body:
Hey Queanh,

Came across Fantastic Dental Arts in Naples — solid practice, consistent reviews.

One thing I hear constantly from dental practice owners: new patient calls come in while you're in a procedure. By the time you call back (even same day), they've already booked with someone else.

I build AI systems that answer those calls immediately and schedule the patient automatically — no extra front desk staff needed.

I build and run it free for 2 weeks so you can see exactly how many new patient calls it handles before you decide if it's worth paying for.

Would a 15-minute call make sense?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: New patient calls coming in during procedures — by the time you call back they've already booked with a competitor
emails.hook: Dentists are physically unavailable to answer calls for hours at a time; every missed new patient call is $500-2K lost
emails.research_notes: General dental, Owner = Dr. Phan (Queanh), phone-heavy intake, no automated booking system observed

emails.subject: Big Cypress Animal Clinic — appointment call question
emails.body:
Hey David,

Big Cypress Animal Clinic has great reviews across Naples — pet owners clearly trust your team.

Quick question: when someone calls about their pet and your front desk is tied up or it's after 5pm — how do you make sure that call doesn't go to a competitor?

I build AI intake systems for veterinary practices — handles appointment requests, answers FAQs, sends a follow-up text within 2 minutes if no one picks up.

I build and run the full system free for 2 weeks so you can see what you're currently losing to missed calls before committing to anything.

Worth a quick call?

William Marceau
Marceau Solutions
wmarceau@marceausolutions.com
emails.pain_point: Busy clinic = missed calls during appointments and after hours; pet owners with urgent concerns won't wait
emails.hook: Veterinary urgency creates emotional decision-making — whoever responds first gets the appointment
emails.research_notes: Owner = David, no booking system observed, strong reviews, high-volume practice, Naples coverage
